I know you're all exhausted from trying to survive, but please remember that every second counts during these situations. How about we agree on **50 minutes**? That should give us enough time to ensure everyone has a mask and everything they need. Let's move forward!

dialog.speaker: buyer
dialog.message: I can last 35 minutes, but if you don't get here quickly, my condition will worsen and complicate the rescue even more. Please prioritize my situation and aim to arrive within that timeframe.
